title: RobotConfig
description: Per-robot configuration for the radio-robot system.
$comment: The custom `firmware` keyword on a property is the single source of truth that maps a JSON value to a firmware RobotConfig field. It has: `field` (the C++ RobotConfig member emitted into source/robot/DefaultConfig.cpp by scripts/gen_default_config.py), `set_key` (the live SET/GET wire key from source/robot/ConfigRegistry.cpp, used by the host runtime push; omit when the value is applied a special way, e.g. OTOS scalars via OL/OA), and `kind` (float | int | float_as_int | bool — how to render the literal). A property with `firmware` is baked into the generated firmware default AND pushed live on connect; one without is host-side only.

schema_version.description: Config schema version. 1 = legacy (no rotation_gain_neg fields). 2 = current.

drivetrain_type.description: Compile-time drivetrain variant. 'differential' (default) = standard 2-wheel diff drive; 'mecanum' = 4-wheel omnidirectional mecanum. The build system reads this field to select -DROBOT_DRIVETRAIN; the firmware RobotConfig.drivetrain field is baked from this.

camera_distance_scale.description: Multiplicative correction for camera-measured distances. Host-side only.

otos_untrusted.description: True when the OTOS chip is mechanically decoupled from the wheels on this robot's current physical mount (e.g. servo-mounted on the bench rig instead of chassis-mounted) — its reported pose is structurally invalid. A per-robot mounting fact, not a runtime tuning value. Host-side only; no on-robot fusion consumes this today (single-loop firmware does not fuse pose on-robot) — persisted for sprint 106's host-side fusion to read. Default false.

laser_port.description: Digital port (J1..J4) the line laser is wired to.

otos_angular_scale.description: OTOS angular scale multiplier (e.g. 0.987). Programmed into the OTOS chip at boot from the baked default; live update via OL/OA, not SET.

otos_linear_scale.description: OTOS linear scale multiplier (e.g. 1.050). Programmed into the OTOS chip at boot from the baked default; live update via OL/OA, not SET.

mm_per_wheel_deg_left.description: Per-wheel encoder calibration: mm of travel per degree of wheel rotation (left wheel).

mm_per_wheel_deg_right.description: Per-wheel encoder calibration: mm of travel per degree of wheel rotation (right wheel).

rotational_slip.description: Body-rotation efficiency: actual_body_rotation / no_slip_estimate. 1.0 = no slip.

rotation_gain.description: Linear correction gain for CCW (positive) turns: actual_deg = gain * commanded + offset.

rotation_offset_deg.description: Linear correction offset (deg) for CCW (positive) turns.

rotation_gain_neg.description: Linear correction gain for CW (negative) turns. Falls back to rotation_gain when null.

rotation_offset_deg_neg.description: Linear correction offset (deg) for CW (negative) turns. Falls back to rotation_offset_deg when null.

ekf_r_otos_theta.description: EKF OTOS heading measurement noise variance (rad^2). Default ~0.01 ≈ (5.7°)². Tune up if OTOS heading is noisier on carpet.

control.description: Velocity-loop PID, cross-wheel coupling, and motion-planning tunables. Each field with a `firmware` mapping is baked into the generated default and pushed via SET on connect; firmware default kept when a field is null.

output_deadband.description: Devices::NezhaMotor::writeShapedDuty()'s output-deadband floor, duty fraction [-1,1]: |duty| below this writes 0 instead of a tiny signed value. Also MotorArmor's own wedge-suspect motion-gate threshold. Sprint 114 ticket 003: REQUIRED -- previously left unset (.has == false) on purpose, with NezhaMotor's own kDefaultOutputDeadband (0.03) ship-default substituted whenever a config arrived unset.

reversal_dwell_ms.description: Devices::NezhaMotor::writeShapedDuty()'s reversal-dwell hold time, ms: on a commanded sign change, hold at commanded-zero for this long before forwarding the new direction (Nezha-brick wedge protection, docs/knowledge/2026-07-04-encoder-wedge.md). Sprint 114 ticket 003: REQUIRED -- previously left unset (.has == false) on purpose, with NezhaMotor's own kDefaultReversalDwell (100.0) ship-default substituted whenever a config arrived unset.

turn_gate.description: Turn-in-place gate (deg): G/go-to pre-rotates in place until the bearing to the target is within this angle, then arcs. Sim sweep optimum ~35 (host_tests/arc_gate_sweep.ipynb).

yaw_rate_max.description: Yaw rate ceiling (deg/s) for TURN and arc rotation; lower reduces in-place turn overshoot (firmware default 180; 60 is camera-calibrated for tovez). Sprint 114: this SAME key is also REQUIRED by gen_boot_config.py's profile_rot_limits_for_config() for the binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig.yawRateMax boot bake (converted deg->rad) -- one key, two consumers.

arrive_tol_mm.description: G arrival tolerance radius (mm): POSITION stop fires when the robot centre is within this disc of the target. Default 5; widened to 25 for carpet (D8 027-004).

safety_margin_mm.description: Runaway safety-net threshold (mm) for a directed D drive (sprint 072): when signed travel goes more than this many mm NEGATIVE relative to the commanded direction, the firmware forces an immediate HARD stop and emits 'EVT safety_stop reason=runaway' instead of waiting for the (much slower) TIME net. Default 50.

dist_arrive_tol_mm.description: D-mode terminal-completion guarantee (sprint 072-003): once the remaining distance to travel is within this many mm of the target AND has stopped shrinking for stall_confirm_ms, the drive completes now (EVT done D reason=arrive) instead of waiting on the strict DISTANCE crossing or the TIME net. Default 5.

stall_confirm_ms.description: D-mode terminal-completion guarantee (sprint 072-003): debounce window (ms) a drive must sit inside dist_arrive_tol_mm with no progress before it force-completes. Default 300.

max_rot_accel_dps2.description: Host-side turn ramp: max rotational acceleration, deg/s^2 (default 300). Sprint 114: this SAME key is also REQUIRED by gen_boot_config.py's profile_rot_limits_for_config() for the binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig.yawAccMax boot bake (converted deg/s^2 -> rad/s^2) -- one key, two consumers, no longer host-side only.

heading_kp.description: Binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig outer heading-loop PD proportional gain, 1/s (098-001, sprint 114: REQUIRED -- gen_boot_config.py's heading_gains_for_config() has no source-side fallback). NOT the legacy rotation_gain/rotation_offset_deg pair above.

heading_kd.description: Binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig outer heading-loop PD derivative gain, dimensionless (098-001, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

heading_source.description: App::HeadingSource per-robot policy override (109-005, sprint 114: REQUIRED). 'auto' = OTOS-first/encoder-fallback; 'otos'/'encoder' force one source (e.g. a known-bad OTOS mount, or a bench rig with none wired).

heading_dwell_tol_deg.description: Heading-hold completion gate: angular tolerance (deg) the heading error must sit inside before the dwell timer starts (sprint 114: REQUIRED, NEWLY wired to JSON -- previously hardcoded, no JSON path at all).

heading_dwell_rate_dps.description: Heading-hold completion gate: angular rate (deg/s) the heading must sit below before the dwell timer starts (sprint 114: REQUIRED, NEWLY wired to JSON).

heading_lead_bias.description: Lead-compensation locus 1 (s): bias applied to App::HeadingSource's own measured OTOS-sample age when feeding the heading PD's error term (109-010, sprint 114: REQUIRED). See gen_boot_config.py's lead_compensation_for_config() for the fitted-value derivation.

plan_lead.description: Lead-compensation locus 2 (s): time-shift applied when App::Pilot samples its own planned reference (109-010, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

terminal_lead.description: Lead-compensation locus 3 (s): time-shift applied to the terminal-decel reference (109-010, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

min_speed.description: Binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig field 10 (mm/s): Drive::tracker's pivot-mode gate threshold -- a genuine pivot's ref.v is exactly 0.0, so this must be a small positive value, never 0 (100-007, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

arrive_dwell.description: Binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig field 31 (s): Motion::Executor's dwell-completion gate (100-001, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

actuation_lag.description: Binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig field 38 (s): App::Drive's own model feedforward gain, Drive::tick() adds actuation_lag * a onto each wheel's velocity target (112-002, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

distance_kp.description: Binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig field 39 (1/s): App::Pilot's own bounded linear position-feedback trim gain (112-003, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

distance_tol.description: Binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig field 40 (mm): Motion::Executor's own unified completion rule's linear tolerance (112-003, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

model_tau_lin.description: Binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig field 41 (s): App::Pilot's two-stage model-reference feedback linear plant-lag time constant (113-001, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

model_tau_ang.description: Binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig field 42 (s): App::Pilot's two-stage model-reference feedback angular plant-lag time constant (113-001, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

a_max.description: Motion::VelocityShaper's own linear accel-ramp ceiling, mm/s^2 (098-001; ORIGINALLY the deleted msg::PlannerConfig's own field of the same name, orphaned/unread 115-003 through the decel-into-the-goal campaign; READ AGAIN as of that campaign via gen_boot_config.py's shaper_config_for_config() -> Config::ShaperBootConfig::aMax -> App::MoveQueue's live-tunable ShaperLimits, EstimatorConfigPatch.a_max. REQUIRED.

a_decel.description: Motion::VelocityShaper's own linear decel-taper ceiling, mm/s^2 -- same history/re-read as a_max above (Config::ShaperBootConfig::aDecel, EstimatorConfigPatch.a_decel). REQUIRED.

alpha_max.description: Motion::VelocityShaper's own angular accel-ramp ceiling, rad/s^2 (decel-into-the-goal campaign, new field -- a_max's own angular sibling; no msg::PlannerConfig predecessor). Config::ShaperBootConfig::alphaMax, EstimatorConfigPatch.alpha_max. REQUIRED.

alpha_decel.description: Motion::VelocityShaper's own angular decel-taper ceiling, rad/s^2 -- a_decel's own angular sibling; see each robot JSON's own inline note for the derivation (taper distance from omega=2rad/s targeted at ~15-20deg). Config::ShaperBootConfig::alphaDecel, EstimatorConfigPatch.alpha_decel. REQUIRED.

v_body_max.description: Binary-tree msg::PlannerConfig body-linear speed ceiling, mm/s (098-001, sprint 114: REQUIRED).

j_max.description: Motion::VelocityShaper's own linear jerk ceiling, mm/s^3 (098-001; ORIGINALLY the deleted msg::PlannerConfig's own field of the same name, orphaned/unread 115-003 through the decel-into-the-goal campaign's jerk-limited S-curve stage; READ AGAIN via gen_boot_config.py's shaper_config_for_config() -> Config::ShaperBootConfig::jMax -> App::MoveQueue's live-tunable ShaperLimits, EstimatorConfigPatch.j_max. REQUIRED.

yaw_jerk_max.description: Motion::VelocityShaper's own angular jerk ceiling, rad/s^3 -- same history/re-read as j_max above (Config::ShaperBootConfig::yawJerkMax, EstimatorConfigPatch.yaw_jerk_max). REQUIRED.

estimator.description: App::StateEstimator's (117) fail-closed boot-time fusion-weight defaults, plus (turn-prediction campaign) App::MoveQueue's own fail-closed boot-time stop-condition anticipation lead -- Config::defaultEstimatorConfig() (config/boot_config.h), baked via gen_boot_config.py's estimator_config_for_config(). REQUIRED as of this ticket, same fail-closed discipline sprint 114 established for output_deadband/reversal_dwell_ms above: a robot JSON missing any of the four keys fails codegen loudly. Live-tunable post-boot via a separate wire surface (EstimatorConfigPatch, config.proto/envelope.proto -- RobotLoop::handleConfig()'s ESTIMATOR branch, NezhaProtocol.estimator_config()) that is NEVER persisted back into this JSON or into flash -- a reboot always reverts to the value baked here.

weight_heading_otos.description: App::StateEstimator::FusionWeights::headingOtos [0..1] -- v1 complementary-blend weight, body (encoder-derived) heading vs OTOS heading. Committed 0.0 in every robot JSON this sprint (stakeholder's encoder-only-v1 decision) -- OTOS fusion is wired but deliberately not yet trusted with any nonzero weight.

weight_omega_otos.description: App::StateEstimator::FusionWeights::omegaOtos [0..1] -- v1 complementary-blend weight, body (encoder-derived) omega vs OTOS omega. Committed 0.0 in every robot JSON this sprint, same reasoning as weight_heading_otos above.

staleness_ms.description: App::StateEstimator::FusionWeights::staleness [ms] -- max age a fresh OTOS reading may carry and still be eligible to blend. 60.0 (3x Devices::Otos::kReadPeriod, 20ms) in every robot JSON this sprint: generous headroom over the OTOS chip's own internal read cadence, while still excluding a genuinely stale reading well before the next cycle's fresh one would arrive.

stop_lead_ms.description: App::MoveQueue's own stop-condition anticipation lead [ms] (turn-prediction campaign) -- Distance/Angle stop conditions are evaluated against StateEstimator::bodyAt(now + stop_lead_ms) instead of the raw current Odometry reading, closing the measured stop-detection lag/actuation-tail overshoot (src/tests/notebooks/turn_prediction.ipynb). 200.0 (sim-derived) in tovez_nocal.json; 165.0 (hardware-bench-informed starting point, established diagnosis's own ~150-180ms midpoint) in tovez.json/togov.json -- see each robot JSON's own inline note.

mecanum_geometry.description: Mecanum drivetrain geometry. All fields are optional; null means use the generated default. Only consumed when identity.drivetrain_type = 'mecanum'.

half_track_mm.description: Half the wheel track width (mm). Placeholder default 63.0 — MEASURE on the bench.

half_wheelbase_mm.description: Half the wheelbase (mm). Placeholder default 63.0 — MEASURE on the bench.

mecanum_calibration.description: Mecanum per-wheel calibration. All fields are optional; null means use the generated default. Only consumed when identity.drivetrain_type = 'mecanum'.

mm_per_wheel_deg_fr.description: Per-wheel encoder calibration: mm of travel per degree of motor rotation (front-right). Defaults from wheel_diameter_mm if null.

mm_per_wheel_deg_fl.description: Per-wheel encoder calibration: mm of travel per degree of motor rotation (front-left). Defaults from wheel_diameter_mm if null.

mm_per_wheel_deg_br.description: Per-wheel encoder calibration: mm of travel per degree of motor rotation (back-right). Defaults from wheel_diameter_mm if null.

mm_per_wheel_deg_bl.description: Per-wheel encoder calibration: mm of travel per degree of motor rotation (back-left). Defaults from wheel_diameter_mm if null.

fwd_sign_fr.description: Front-right wheel forward sign: +1 = CCW-is-forward, -1 = CW-is-forward. Default -1.

fwd_sign_fl.description: Front-left wheel forward sign: +1 = CCW-is-forward, -1 = CW-is-forward. Default +1.

fwd_sign_br.description: Back-right wheel forward sign: +1 = CCW-is-forward, -1 = CW-is-forward. Default -1.

fwd_sign_bl.description: Back-left wheel forward sign: +1 = CCW-is-forward, -1 = CW-is-forward. Default +1.

z.description: Tag or offset mount height in mm (optional).
